subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is worthy of the Sovereign of existence, Who hath adorned the world of humanity with the ornament of utterance, the Guide and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سلطان وجودیرا لایق و سزاست که عالم انسانرا بطراز بیان مزین فرمود هادی و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
